moneyfest.cta: Get exclusive access before others thanks to MoneyFest 2025!
moneyfest.title: Help shape the future of independent financial planning, join the Kalkul community.
moneyfest.subtitle: Kalkul is a new application that helps independent professional advisors create, visualize and share financial plans with clients.
moneyfest.disclaimer: Kalkul is available as a limited free beta version, intended for testing purposes only.

forgotPassword.forgotPasswordText: Enter the email associated with your account and you will receive a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.resetPasswordLocal: If there’s an account associated {email}, you will receive an email to your {link} with instructions to reset your password.
forgotPassword.resetPasswordRemote: If there’s an account {email} you will receive an email with instructions to reset your password.
forgotPassword.checkSpam: Don’t see the email? Please check your spam folder.

landing.title: Make {colorHigh} Financial Plans
landing.subtitle: Kalkul helps professional advisors create, visualise and share financial plans with their clients.
landing.betaAccessTitle: Get early and free access to Kalkul Beta today!
landing.betaAccessDescription: Join an exclusive group of forward-thinking professionals who are helping us shape the future of independent finance.
landing.betaDiscountText: Beta users will receive an exclusive discount at public launch.

account.subscriptionDisclaimer: Your subscription will automatically renew annually on a recurring basis.
account.deleteAccountModalText: Please send an email to {email} in order to permanently delete your account and all its data.
account.errorFailedToUpdateLanguage: Error: could not update language preference
account.activeSubscriptionNote: To review your payment & billing details or manage anything about your subscription, please use the button below.
account.needSubscription: You need a subscription to use Kalkul
account.expiringIn: {count, plural, one {# day remaining} other {# days remaining}}
account.cancelBeforeDate: Cancel before {date} and you won’t be charged.
account.cancelReminder: We will remind you via email 7 days before your trial period ends. To review your payment & billing details or manage anything about your subscription, please use the button below.

home.clientDeleteWarning: This client and all the portfolios it contains will be deleted permanently. There’s no undo.
home.createYourFirstClient: Create your first client profile to get started
home.kalkulExplanation: Kalkul helps professional advisors create, visualise and share financial plans with their clients.
home.loginOnComputer: Once you’ll be in front of your computer, login with your account to kalkul.app and start testing yourself.
home.kalkulNotAvailableOnMobile: Kalkul will be available on mobile soon!
home.kalkulIsBeta: Kalkul is currently available as a limited free beta, for testing purposes only
home.helpText: Need more help or have feedback? Join our {discordCommunityLink} or contact us at {supportEmail}.

client.clientEmailExplanation: This will be used for sharing portfolio with your client.
client.clientDeleteExplanation: This client and all the portfolios it contains will be deleted permanently. There’s no undo.
client.profileImageHelper: Enter a name to generate a profile picture or upload an image of your choice.
client.deletePortfolioWarning: This portfolio and all the investments it contains will be deleted permanently. There’s no undo.

signUp.verificationLinkRemote: An email with a verification link was sent to {email}.

signUp.checkSpam: Don’t see the email? Please check your spam folder.

portfolio.createYourFirstInvestment: Create a first investment in this portfolio

share.linkSharingExplanation1: Anyone with the link can view the portfolio — but only you can edit.
share.linkSharingExplanation2: Changes you make will be visible under the same link.

changeEmail.header: Check your new email to confirm change!
changeEmail.bodyRemote: An email with a verification link was sent to {newEmail}.
changeEmail.bodyLocal: An email with a verification link was sent to {link}.
changeEmail.footer: Your account’s email won’t be changed until the new address is verified.
changeEmail.checkSpam: Don’t see the email? Please check your spam folder.

editInvestment.foundMatchingProducts: {numProducts, plural, one {We found one product matching your search and portfolio currency ({currency})} other {We found # products matching your search and portfolio currency ({currency})}}
editInvestment.matchingProductExplanation: Products in other currencies are not shown. APY will be calculated on a 10y basis
editInvestment.isin: Please enter an ISIN number or a ticker symbol
editInvestment.isinExplanation: An International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) is a unique twelve-digit code that is assigned to every security issuance in the world.
editInvestment.tickerExplanation: A ticker symbol, also known as a stock symbol, is a unique combination of letters assigned to publicly traded companies on stock exchanges.
editInvestment.errorFetchingIsin: There was an error during fetching ISIN number
editInvestment.noProductsFound: No products matching your search and portfolio currency ({currency})
editInvestment.noImportDataFound: No import data found, please enter manually
editInvestment.foundMoreInOtherCurrencies: We found {numMatching} more matching products in other currencies
editInvestment.matchingButNotPortfolioCurrency: These are matching your search but not your portfolio currency
editInvestment.noProductsInCurrencyButFoundInOthers: We didn't find any product matching your search in {currency}, but we found {numMatching} matching products in other currencies
editInvestment.matchingSearchButNotCurrency: These are matching your search but not your portfolio currency.
editInvestment.tryDifferentSearch: Please try a different search term or add the investment manually
editInvestment.deleteInvestmentWarning: This investment will be deleted permanently. There's no undo.
editInvestment.terHelper: Annual total fund cost – includes management, operation and administration.
editInvestment.entryFeeHelper: Fee paid when entering the investment – usually once or ongoing.
editInvestment.exitFeeHelper: Fee charged when withdrawing the investment – can be fixed or percentage.
editInvestment.managementFeeHelper: Regular fee for investment management – usually annual percentage of asset value.

editPortfolio.deletePortfolioWarning: This portfolio and all the investments it contains will be deleted permanently. There’s no undo.

editTransaction.deleteConfirmWarning: Are you sure you want to delete?

help.title: Help
help.text: If you need help, have questions, suggestions, or feedback, we recommend contacting us through our Discord server. Alternatively, you can contact us via email at {email}.
help.discordInfo: We also share news, product updates and announcements on Discord, don't miss out!

investmentCard.noTransactionsYetText: Use the button above to add one

linkSharingConfirmation.title: Turn link sharing off?
linkSharingConfirmation.text: The current link will no longer work, people might lose access.
linkSharingConfirmation.smallText: If you re-activate link sharing later on, a new link will be generated.

portfolioHeader.deletePortfolioWarning: This portfolio and all the investments it contains will be deleted permanently. There's no undo.

PDFExport.exportDescription: The "Value" chart is included by default. You can use the options below to customise your PDF file.
PDFExport.includeBreakdown: Include portfolio breakdown at key date(s)
PDFExport.breakdownExplanation: Show a breakdown of the portfolio value at specific dates.

transactionCard.deleteWarning: Are you sure you want to delete?

helpBox.addClientText: Press the "Add client" button to create your first client
helpBox.clientListExplanation: This page will list all your clients. You can access it anytime by clicking on the Kalkul logo in the top-left corner of the screen. Once you set up your first client, you will be able to create an investment portfolio for this client.
helpBox.addPortfolioText: Press the "Add portfolio" button to add a first portfolio for this client
helpBox.portfolioExplanation: A portfolio will contain specific investments. Use portfolios to organise investments for your client. You can create as many portfolios as you want for each client. All the portfolios for this client will be listed on the client's page.
helpBox.addInvestmentText: Press the "Add investment" button to add a first investment in this portfolio
helpBox.investmentExplanation: You can create as many investments as you want in a client portfolio. Once you have at least one investment set up, this page will display detailed information about the whole portfolio.
helpBox.addTransactionText: In the left sidebar, press the "Add transaction" button within the desired investment card.
helpBox.transactionExplanation: Transactions define the amount of money that is deposited or withdrawn for this specific investment over time.
